# Malawi Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Last updated: 2026-05-27. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-Region Data Files

- [Northern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/northern-mw1.txt) — 7 districts, 76 traditional authoritys
- [Central](https://github.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/central-mw2.txt) — 10 districts, 178 traditional authoritys
- [Southern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/southern-mw3.txt) — 15 districts, 179 traditional authoritys

## Summary

| Region | Districts | Traditional Authoritys | 
|---|---|---|
| Northern | 7 | 76 | 
| Central | 10 | 178 | 
| Southern | 15 | 179 |
